narrative:
Wayne Twp township has 3,031 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.2 percentage points.
